task.title: Create Node.js integration service skeleton
task.description: Initialize Bun project with Elysia framework and Effect TypeScript setup

implementation.details: Setup package.json with Bun runtime, Elysia 1.x, Effect 3.x dependencies. Create project structure with routes, services, and Effect layer patterns.

task.acceptance_criteria: Service runs with Bun, Elysia server responds, Effect imports work correctly, Docker image builds
